schema: Per-circuit store for the circuit-guide lens. Each circuit is its own file in this folder (canonical record for that circuit's breakdown). This index lists display order + the file pointer + the join-by-slug key. The circuit guide fetches this index, then loads each circuit file. Mirrors the f1-results/2026 per-round pattern. Circuit-guide round numbers are the guide's own display numbering and join to the results store BY SLUG, not by round (they differ: e.g. Silverstone is r11 here, r9 in the results store).
note: Rounds 4-5 are intentionally unused in the circuit-guide numbering (pre-existing quirk carried over from the inline modules); the calendar is 22 built circuits. Flagged for Michael, not changed in this data-layer refactor.
